name: Egg Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the egg yolks and whole egg until light in color.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar until incorporated.
3. Heat the cream and milk together, then scald them gently.
4. Gradually add the hot cream mixture into the egg yolk mixture.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the combined mixture evenly into six individual custard cups.
7. Sprinkle each cup with freshly grated nutmeg.
8. Place the custard cups in a baking pan and add hot water to reach halfway up the sides of the cups.
9. Bake at 325°F for one hour, or until a knife inserted into the custard comes clean.
10. Serve the custard hot, warm, or cold.
